name: Chocolate Mint Sandwich Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Shortening (1/3 of which May be butter or margarine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening with the sugar.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and cocoa) together in a separate bowl.
4. Alternately add the milk and vanilla to the creamed shortening-sugar mixture.
5. Chill the dough well.
6. Form the chilled dough into 2 long rolls.
7. Cut the rolls into slices about 1/8 inch thick.
8. Bake on a greased cookie sheet at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Allow the cookies to cool completely.
10. Assemble the cooled cookies in pairs using the following filling:
- Mix powdered sugar with mint flavoring (any mint flavoring works well) and a few drops of green food coloring (optional).
- Spread the mixture between the cookies to form sandwiches.
Source: Kitchen Klatter Cook Book
